cmd='/usr/local/bin/cmake;-DCMAKE_TOOLCHAIN_FILE=;-DLEVELDB_BUILD_TESTS=OFF;-DLEVELDB_BUILD_BENCHMARKS=OFF;-DCMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX=/home/runner/work/ldbdump/ldbdump/eastoncrafter/ldbdump/build/external/external-install;-DCMAKE_REQUIRED_LINK_OPTIONS=-L/home/runner/work/ldbdump/ldbdump/eastoncrafter/ldbdump/build/external/external-install/lib;-DCMAKE_REQUIRED_FLAGS=-I/home/runner/work/ldbdump/ldbdump/eastoncrafter/ldbdump/build/external/external-install/include;-DCMAKE_CXX_FLAGS=-I/home/runner/work/ldbdump/ldbdump/eastoncrafter/ldbdump/build/external/external-install/include;-DCMAKE_SHARED_LINKER_FLAGS=-L/home/runner/work/ldbdump/ldbdump/eastoncrafter/ldbdump/build/external/external-install/lib;-DCMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS=-L/home/runner/work/ldbdump/ldbdump/eastoncrafter/ldbdump/build/external/external-install/lib;-GUnix Makefiles;-S;<SOURCE_DIR><SOURCE_SUBDIR>;-B;<BINARY_DIR>'
